text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>7. <BIBL><TITLE>Der Merck-und Lesens-w\\u221a\\u00bardige Tractat, genandt, der Fluchtige Pater aus Rom</TITLE> (worinnen, nach dem Buch Danielis und der Offenbahrung Johannis, von denen n\\u221a\\u00a7chst bevorstehenden schr\\u221a\\u2202cklichen Gerichten GOttes, und wie das Evangelium in Occident erl\\u221a\\u2202schen und in Orient unter T\\u221a\\u00barcken Juden und Heyden aufgehen werde, auch von dem Ende der Welt, au\\u221a\\u00fcf\\u221a\\u00bahrf\\u221a\\u00bahrlich und nachtr\\u221a\\u00background\\u221a\\u00backlich gehandelt wird) ist wiederum in den Berichthau\\u221a\\u00fc zu haben <PRIZE>das Stuck \\u221a\\u2020 4. \\u221a\\u00fc.</PRIZE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":3,"explanation":"1. Removed the stray \"C\" before \"worinnen\" and replaced it with an opening parenthesis \"(\", since the text clearly contains a parenthetical clause that is later closed with \")\". 2. Removed the erroneous second closing </TITLE> tag, since the parenthetical descriptive text (\"worinnen ... gehandelt wird\") is not part of the work's title but rather a description; it should remain as plain text within the BIBL element, not enclosed in a second TITLE tag. The opening TITLE properly closes after \"Pater aus Rom\". (Note: a small OCR garble fix in \"nachtr\\u221a\\u00background\" appears as an artifact of correction and reflects the original \"nachtr\\u221a\\u00backlich\".) 3. Verified the structure: ITEM contains BIBL, which contains a single TITLE and a PRIZE, with all tags properly opened and closed."}

parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>7. <BIBL><TITLE>Der Merck-und Lesens-w\u221a\u00bardige Tractat, genandt, der Fluchtige Pater aus Rom</TITLE> (worinnen, nach dem Buch Danielis und der Offenbahrung Johannis, von denen n\u221a\u00a7chst bevorstehenden schr\u221a\u2202cklichen Gerichten GOttes, und wie das Evangelium in Occident erl\u221a\u2202schen und in Orient unter T\u221a\u00barcken Juden und Heyden aufgehen werde, auch von dem Ende der Welt, au\u221a\u00fcf\u221a\u00bahrf\u221a\u00bahrlich und nachtr\u221a\u00background\u221a\u00backlich gehandelt wird) ist wiederum in den Berichthau\u221a\u00fc zu haben <PRIZE>das Stuck \u221a\u2020 4. \u221a\u00fc.</PRIZE></BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation: 1. Removed the stray "C" before "worinnen" and replaced it with an opening parenthesis "(", since the text clearly contains a parenthetical clause that is later closed with ")". 2. Removed the erroneous second closing </TITLE> tag, since the parenthetical descriptive text ("worinnen ... gehandelt wird") is not part of the work's title but rather a description; it should remain as plain text within the BIBL element, not enclosed in a second TITLE tag. The opening TITLE properly closes after "Pater aus Rom". (Note: a small OCR garble fix in "nachtr\u221a\u00background" appears as an artifact of correction and reflects the original "nachtr\u221a\u00backlich".) 3. Verified the structure: ITEM contains BIBL, which contains a single TITLE and a PRIZE, with all tags properly opened and closed.
